title: Xtra Flaky Polish Pandan Leaf Pierogi
description: A tangy and comforting Polish dish featuring pandan leaf, this recipe is a unique twist on traditional pierogi, with a flaky crust and satvik-friendly ingredients. The pandan leaf adds a distinct flavor and aroma to the dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, pandan leaf extract, and salt.
Add the melted butter to the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the mashed potato and onion mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
Fry the pierogi until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the pierogi hot with your favorite toppings.
